name: Reach Resources Limited
analysis: RR1's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 32% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.0130, stop A$0.0099, target A$0.0150 (0.65:1) — then trail it.
